Tests for Math.sqrt function behavior with NaN, negative numbers, zero, and Infinity.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.17-001.js](15.08.02.17-001.js.md)**: Tests if the square root of NaN returns NaN using the Math.sqrt function.
- **[15.08.02.17-002.js](15.08.02.17-002.js.md)**: Tests that the square root of -2 is NaN using Math.sqrt and isNaN functions.
- **[15.08.02.17-003.js](15.08.02.17-003.js.md)**: Tests if dividing 1 by the square root of positive zero results in Infinity.
- **[15.08.02.17-004.js](15.08.02.17-004.js.md)**: Tests that the reciprocal of the square root of negative zero is negative infinity.
- **[15.08.02.17-005.js](15.08.02.17-005.js.md)**: Tests that the square root of Infinity is Infinity using an assertion.
